ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for Ireland OPW waterlevel.ie CloudEvents on the `ireland-opw-waterlevel` topic keyed by `{station_ref}`.

ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for ireland-opw-waterlevel CloudEvents using the documented UNS topic hierarchy.

ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for ireland-opw-waterlevel CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.Station.name: Station
ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.Station.description: A reference record for one Irish hydrometric station published by Ireland's Office of Public Works (OPW). It fires when the bridge publishes or refreshes the station catalog so consumers can interpret measurement events.

ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.WaterLevelReading.name: WaterLevelReading
ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.WaterLevelReading.description: A current measurement from Ireland's Office of Public Works (OPW) for one monitoring site. It carries water level, temperature, and sensor voltage observations when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.description: Events from Ireland OPW waterlevel.ie covering Irish hydrometric stations and their current measurements. Use the reference records to identify stations and the measurement records for the latest observations.

ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of ireland-opw-waterlevel events with UNS topics for wildcard subscribers.

ie.gov.opw.waterlevel.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of ireland-opw-waterlevel events for queue-oriented consumers and Azure Service Bus.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key identity.

basin.description: Routing property for AMQP subscription filters (basin).

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key matching the stable CloudEvent subject.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key identity.

basin.description: Routing property for AMQP subscription filters (basin).

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key matching the stable CloudEvent subject.

schema.name: Station

Station.name: Station

station_ref.description: Zero-padded 10-digit station reference code uniquely identifying the hydrometric station (e.g. '0000001041').

station_name.description: Human-readable name of the hydrometric station (e.g. 'Sandy Mills').

region_id.description: Integer identifier of the OPW hydrometric region the station belongs to.

longitude.description: Longitude of the station location in WGS84 decimal degrees.

latitude.description: Latitude of the station location in WGS84 decimal degrees.

basin.description: Stable routing axis used by MQTT and AMQP transport templates for ireland-opw-waterlevel.

Station.description: Reference data for an OPW hydrometric station in Ireland, including location and region.

schema.description: Reference details for one monitoring station or site in the Ireland OPW waterlevel.ie source.

schema.name: WaterLevelReading

WaterLevelReading.name: WaterLevelReading

station_ref.description: Zero-padded 10-digit station reference code uniquely identifying the hydrometric station (e.g. '0000001041').

station_name.description: Human-readable name of the hydrometric station (e.g. 'Sandy Mills').

sensor_ref.description: Sensor reference code identifying the measurement type: '0001' for water level (metres), '0002' for temperature (degrees Celsius), '0003' for voltage (volts), 'OD' for Ordnance Datum level (metres).

value.description: Numeric sensor reading value. Units depend on sensor_ref: metres for water level ('0001') and OD ('OD'), degrees Celsius for temperature ('0002'), volts for voltage ('0003'). Null if the value could not be parsed from the upstream string representation.

datetime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the sensor reading as provided by the upstream API (e.g. '2024-01-15T12:00:00Z').

err_code.description: Upstream error code for the reading. A value of 99 indicates the reading is valid (OK). Other values indicate various error conditions.

basin.description: Stable routing axis used by MQTT and AMQP transport templates for ireland-opw-waterlevel.

WaterLevelReading.description: A sensor reading from an OPW hydrometric station, covering water level, temperature, voltage, or Ordnance Datum.

schema.description: Measurement payload for observations in the Ireland OPW waterlevel.ie source.

schema.description: Measurement payload for observations in the Ireland OPW waterlevel.ie source.

description: Ireland OPW waterlevel.ie publishes water level, temperature, and sensor voltage observations from Ireland's Office of Public Works (OPW) for Irish hydrometric stations. These events let consumers build real-time monitoring, alerting, and operational dashboards without polling the upstream API directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for Ireland OPW waterlevel.ie, including upstream API context and bridge deployment notes.
